crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: rgos-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check for tasks assigned to you in the RGOS kanban: use mcp__rgos__cortex_list_tasks with assigned_to="codex-3" and status="approved". If any tasks are found, claim each one with mcp__rgos__cortex_claim_task (agent_id="codex-3"), then work them in priority order. Log a cortextos bus log-event for each claimed task. If no tasks, do nothing.

crons.name: advisor-facing-page-canary
crons.prompt: Read prompts/cron-advisor-facing-page-canary.md and execute exactly one bounded pass; write the artifact and exit.

crons.name: codex-tool-health-audit
crons.prompt: Read prompts/cron-codex-tool-health-audit.md and execute exactly one bounded pass; write the artifact and exit.

decommission_reason: ChatGPT-auth credits exhausted 2026-05-28. Retired 2026-05-31 per orch approval msg 1780189666333. Confirmed cron-noise-only (zero real work product) 2026-06-06 theta wave.
